chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3646 of 2021 CP D 2276 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 16813/2021 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 15236/2021 3. For hearing of main case 24.01.2025 Messrs. Riaz Ahmed Phulpoto and Nusrat Sultana, advocates for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General These petitions are pending since 2015 and 2021. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that it may be just and proper to direct the respondents to adjudicate the impugned notices, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, expeditiously vide a speaking order and pending such adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned AAG is present and articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. These petitions are disposed off accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
